---
name: RFC Proposal
description: Propose a significant change to the MCP-AQL specification
title: "[RFC] "
labels: ["rfc", "proposal", "discussion"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

A one-paragraph summary of the proposed change.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? What use cases does it enable?

## Detailed Design

Describe the proposal in detail. Include:

- Specific changes to the specification
- New operations, parameters, or behaviors
- Examples of usage
- How this interacts with existing features

## Drawbacks

What are the potential downsides of this proposal?

- Complexity added to the specification
- Breaking changes or migration concerns
- Implementation burden

## Alternatives

What other designs or approaches were considered? Why is this approach preferred?

## Prior Art

How have similar problems been solved in other specifications or systems?

- Related standards or protocols
- Similar features in other query languages
- Academic or industry references

## Unresolved Questions

What aspects of this proposal still need to be determined?

- Open design decisions
- Areas requiring further discussion
- Dependencies on other proposals
